mapper.select: /* User02Mapper.selectSiteInfoSearch */ SELECT '' AS CHK , A.CMPNY_CD , A.SITE_CD , A.SITE_NO , A.SITE_NM , CONCAT(A.ADDR_1, ' ', A.ADDR_2) AS ADDR , TEL_NO , CASE WHEN B.SITE_CD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ALLOC_YN FROM TB_SITE A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.CMPNY_CD , A.USER_ID , B.SITE_CD FROM TB_USER A INNER JOIN TB_USER_SITE_AUTH B ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = B.CMPNY_CD AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{param.userId} ) B ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = B.CMPNY_CD AND A.SITE_CD = B.SITE_CD ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
